positive: A highly stylized, minimalist composition featuring an abstract mountain range silhouette rising above a calm, stylized geometric lake. The mountain peaks are rendered in deep indigo and charcoal grey, creating sharp, clean lines against a vibrant, gradient background of sunrise gold and dusty turquoise. Incorporate stylized celestial elements like a single, crescent moon and stylized geometric stars, all using thick, solid linework. The overall mood is serene and majestic. Vector art style, strong contrast, clean silhouette, high detail, perfect for apparel printing, centered composition, symmetry, flat design, negative space utilization, graphic novel aesthetic.
negative: photorealistic, blurry, low detail, noisy, grainy, text, watermark, signature, logo, copyright, multiple subjects, bad anatomy, deformed, cropped, extra limbs, cartoonish, distracting, messy
